name: Peponk
description: Peponk is a community-driven, NFT-backed digital asset project built on the Solana blockchain. It's a people-first crypto project that combines viral meme culture with real utility, focusing on digital engagement, creative branding, and simple tools for holders. The project's mission is to build a recognizable, community-powered brand that evolves beyond traditional meme speculation, emphasizing strong community ownership, clear communication, and sustainable growth.
